lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ਦਾਸ ਰਖਿਅਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਸਤੇ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: kantth laae daas rakhian naanak har sate |20|
lines.english: But hugging His slaves close to His Heart, O Nanak, the True Lord saves them. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਥੇ ਵਾਲਿ ਪਛਾੜਿਅਨੁ ਜਮ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਮੁਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: mathe vaal pachhaarrian jam maarag mute |
lines.english: Grabbing them by the hair on their heads, the Lord throws them down, and leaves them on the path of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖਿ ਲਗੈ ਬਿਲਲਾਣਿਆ ਨਰਕਿ ਘੋਰਿ ਸੁਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh lagai bilalaaniaa narak ghor sute |
lines.english: They cry out in pain, in the darkest of hells.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀਹੋ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: raam japahu vaddabhaageeho jal thal pooran soe |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord, O fortunate ones; He is pervading the waters and the earth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਧਿਆਇਐ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaaeiai bighan na laagai koe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and no misfortune shall strike you. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਬਿਘਨ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਾਗਤੇ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott bighan tis laagate jis no visarai naau |
lines.english: Millions of misfortunes block the way of one who forgets the Name of the Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਬਿਲਪਤੇ ਜਿਉ ਸੁੰਞੈ ਘਰਿ ਕਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak anadin bilapate jiau sunyai ghar kaau |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, like a crow in a deserted house, he cries out, night and day. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪੂਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar daataar manorath pooriaa |
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance of the Great Giver, one's heart's desires are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਘਾਲਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: jot milee sang jot rahiaa ghaaladaa |
lines.english: My light is merged into the Light, and my labors are over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਛ ਪੁੰਨੀ ਮਨਿ ਆਸ ਗਏ ਵਿਸੂਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: eichh punee man aas ge visooriaa |
lines.english: The hopes and desires of the mind are realized, and sorrows are forgotten.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਭਾਲਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: paaeaa naam nidhaan jis no bhaaladaa |
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is obtained; I have searched for it for so long.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਆਨੰਦ ਵੁਠੇ ਤਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj aanand vutthe tith ghar |
lines.english: I abide in that house of peace, poise and bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣ ਰਹੇ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਤਹਾ ਮਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan rahe janam na tahaa mar |
lines.english: My comings and goings have ended - there is no birth or death there.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗੂਜਰੀ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag goojaree bhagataa kee baanee |
lines.english: Raag Goojaree, The Words Of The Devotees:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਇਕੁ ਇਕੁ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saahib sevak ik ik drisattaaeaa |
lines.english: The Master and the servant have become one, with no sense of separation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੨੧॥੧॥੨॥ ਸੁਧੁ
lines.translit: gur prasaad naanak sach samaaeaa |21|1|2| sudh
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, Nanak is absorbed in the True Lord. ||21||1||2||Sudh||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਪਾਵ ਦੁਇ ਸਿੰਗ ਗੁੰਗ ਮੁਖ ਤਬ ਕੈਸੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਈਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: chaar paav due sing gung mukh tab kaise gun geehai |
lines.english: With four feet, two horns and a mute mouth, how could you sing the Praises of the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕਾ ਚਉਪਦਾ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਦੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: sree kabeer jeeo kaa chaupadaa ghar 2 doojaa |
lines.english: Chau-Padhay Of Kabeer Jee, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਠਤ ਬੈਠਤ ਠੇਗਾ ਪਰਿਹੈ ਤਬ ਕਤ ਮੂਡ ਲੁਕਈਹੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aootthat baitthat tthegaa parihai tab kat moodd lukeehai |1|
lines.english: Standing up and sitting down, the stick shall still fall on you, so where will you hide your head? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਾਟੇ ਨਾਕਨ ਟੂਟੇ ਕਾਧਨ ਕੋਦਉ ਕੋ ਭੁਸੁ ਖਈਹੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: faatte naakan ttootte kaadhan kodau ko bhus kheehai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: with your nose torn, and your shoulders injured, you shall have only the straw of coarse grain to eat. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਬੈਲ ਬਿਰਾਨੇ ਹੁਈਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: har bin bail biraane hueehai |
lines.english: Without the Lord, you are like a stray ox;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰੋ ਦਿਨੁ ਡੋਲਤ ਬਨ ਮਹੀਆ ਅਜਹੁ ਨ ਪੇਟ ਅਘਈਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: saaro din ddolat ban maheea ajahu na pett agheehai |
lines.english: All day long, you shall wander in the forest, and even then, your belly will not be full.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਕਰਤ ਮਹਾ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਬੂਡੋ ਅਨਿਕ ਜੋਨਿ ਭਰਮਈਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh karat mahaa bhram booddo anik jon bharameehai |
lines.english: Enduring pleasure and pain, drowned in the great ocean of doubt, you shall wander in numerous reincarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਭਗਤਨ ਕੋ ਕਹੋ ਨ ਮਾਨੋ ਕੀਓ ਅਪਨੋ ਪਈਹੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan bhagatan ko kaho na maano keeo apano peehai |2|
lines.english: You did not follow the advice of the humble devotees, and so you shall obtain the fruits of your actions. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਜਨਮੁ ਖੋਇਓ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬਿਸਰਿਓ ਇਹੁ ਅਉਸਰੁ ਕਤ ਪਈਹੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ratan janam khoeo prabh bisario ihu aausar kat peehai |3|
lines.english: You have lost the jewel of human birth by forgetting God; when will you have such an opportunity again? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮਤ ਫਿਰਤ ਤੇਲਕ ਕੇ ਕਪਿ ਜਿਉ ਗਤਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਬਿਹਈਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhramat firat telak ke kap jiau gat bin rain biheehai |
lines.english: You turn on the wheel of reincarnation, like an ox at the oil-press; the night of your life passes away without salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੂੰਡ ਧੁਨੇ ਪਛੁਤਈਹੈ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer raam naam bin moondd dhune pachhuteehai |4|1|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, without the Name of the Lord, you shall pound your head, and regret and repent. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨਨਾ ਬੁਨਨਾ ਸਭੁ ਤਜਿਓ ਹੈ ਕਬੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: tananaa bunanaa sabh tajio hai kabeer |
lines.english: Kabeer has given up all his spinning and weaving,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਸਿ ਮੁਸਿ ਰੋਵੈ ਕਬੀਰ ਕੀ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: mus mus rovai kabeer kee maaee |
lines.english: Kabeer's mother sobs, cries and bewails

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree ghar 3 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਬਾਰਿਕ ਕੈਸੇ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਰਘੁਰਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: e baarik kaise jeeveh raghuraaee |1|
lines.english: - O Lord, how will my grandchildren live? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਤਾਗਾ ਬਾਹਉ ਬੇਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag taagaa baahau behee |
lines.english: As long as I pass the thread through the bobbin,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਿਖਿ ਲੀਓ ਸਰੀਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam likh leeo sareer |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and written the Name of the Lord on his body. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਹਿਓ ਮੈ ਲਾਹਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam lahio mai laahaa |3|
lines.english: but I have earned the profit of the Name of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਰਾਮੁ ਸਨੇਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tab lag bisarai raam sanehee |2|
lines.english: I forget the Lord, my Beloved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਛੀ ਮਤਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਜਾਤਿ ਜੁਲਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: ochhee mat meree jaat julaahaa |
lines.english: My intellect is lowly - I am a weaver by birth,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰਾ ਇਨ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਰਘੁਰਾਈ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: hamaraa in kaa daataa ek raghuraaee |4|2|
lines.english: - the Lord alone is the Provider, for me and my children. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਮੇਰੀ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer sunahu meree maaee |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, listen, O my mother
